← [ARTIFICE UI]

The Vibes

Every website has a vibe. Each demo below actually performs its own -- and tells you, straight up, which features are worth it and which ones are just vanity. The cards are already doing it, too: each one's dressed in the vibe it leads to.

Every feature gets stamped with a verdict:

  • Essential -- earns its place
  • Situational -- only in the right context
  • Vanity -- looks great, does little
  • ⚠ Manipulative -- converts, but costs trust
  • Enter the demo →

    The Showpiece

    Motion-first branding -- big, cinematic, scroll-driven. Made to be felt, not skimmed.

    A loud ↔ quiet dial -- same engine whether it's agency or luxury.

  • Enter the demo →

    The Product Site

    Structure and conversion -- trust signals, feature grids, pricing, CTAs.

    Swap the arrangement: corporate, SaaS, or one-CTA.

  • Enter the demo →

    The Storefront

    Commerce -- grids, carts, badges, and some honest urgency.

    An actual working cart, with real product state.

  • Enter the demo →

    The Statement

    Aesthetic personality -- playful, brutalist, web3, retro. Attitude over utility, basically.

    A skin-swap -- the vibe is just a stylesheet here, not a different engine.

  • Enter the demo →

    The Editorial

    Content and reading -- typography, drop caps, pull quotes, menus.

    An actual reading system.
